turns.question: Hey, how's it going?
turns.answer: Pretty good, thanks. How about you?

turns.question: Morning! Did you sleep okay?
turns.answer: Not really, I was up way too late last night.

turns.question: Hey you, how was your commute?
turns.answer: Not bad, traffic was lighter than usual today.

turns.question: Hi there, how's your day treating you?
turns.answer: Can't complain, just a normal Tuesday.

turns.question: Hey, good to see you -- how are things?
turns.answer: Things are good, staying busy as always.

turns.question: What's going on with you today?
turns.answer: Not much, just trying to get through some emails.

turns.question: Hey, you got a minute?
turns.answer: Yeah, of course, what's up?

turns.question: How'd the rest of your week go?
turns.answer: Honestly, it flew by, I barely noticed it was Friday.

turns.question: Hey, did you end up finishing that thing you were working on?
turns.answer: Yeah, finally wrapped it up last night.

turns.question: Morning! You look tired today.
turns.answer: Yeah, I definitely need more coffee.

turns.question: Hey, how's the family doing?
turns.answer: Everyone's doing well, thanks for asking.

turns.question: Hi, did you eat lunch yet?
turns.answer: Not yet, I was thinking of grabbing something in a bit.

turns.question: Hey there, how've you been holding up?
turns.answer: Honestly, pretty good, all things considered.

turns.question: You good?
turns.answer: Yeah, all good, just a long day.

turns.question: How was your weekend, by the way?
turns.answer: It was nice, pretty relaxed for once.

turns.question: Hey, everything going okay on your end?
turns.answer: Yeah, smooth sailing so far today.

turns.question: Hi, how's work been treating you?
turns.answer: It's been busy, but nothing I can't handle.

turns.question: Hey, you still feeling under the weather?
turns.answer: A bit, but I'm definitely getting better.

turns.question: Morning, ready for the day?
turns.answer: As ready as I'll ever be, I guess.

turns.question: Hey, long day or good day so far?
turns.answer: A bit of both, honestly.

turns.question: Hi, did you catch the game last night?
turns.answer: Yeah, I did -- what a finish, right?

turns.question: Hey, you look happy today, what's up?
turns.answer: Just got some good news this morning.

turns.question: How's everything going with the move?
turns.answer: It's coming along, still a lot of boxes though.

turns.question: Hey, did you get much sleep?
turns.answer: Barely, but I'll survive.

turns.question: Morning! Big plans for today?
turns.answer: Not really, just the usual stuff.

turns.question: Hey, feeling any better than yesterday?
turns.answer: Yeah, a little bit, thanks for checking in.

turns.question: Hi, how's the new place working out?
turns.answer: It's great so far, still getting settled in.

turns.question: Hey, did that meeting go okay earlier?
turns.answer: Yeah, better than I expected, actually.

turns.question: How are you holding up with everything lately?
turns.answer: Honestly, taking it one day at a time.

turns.question: Hey, good to see your face around here again.
turns.answer: Ha, yeah, it's been a minute.
